description: Make email attachment download functional with signed URLs, add inline preview for images/PDFs, tighten storage RLS for team isolation, and add file type icons.

userStories.title: Download API endpoint (signed URLs)
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to download email attachments securely via signed URLs, so that storage paths are never exposed to the client.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates attachment belongs to an email in user's team
userStories.notes: Created /api/emails/[id]/attachments/[attachmentId]/route.ts. Double validation (attachment→email, email→team). Service role for cross-table checks. createSignedUrl with 3600s expiry. Generic 404 to prevent info disclosure.

userStories.title: Wire download button in UI
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire viewing an email, I want the download button to actually download the file when I click it.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking download fetches signed URL from API then triggers browser download
Loading state shown on button while fetching
userStories.notes: Added handleDownloadAttachment with fetch→signedUrl→programmatic link click. Loader2 spinner during download. toast.error on failure. Button disabled during download.

userStories.title: Inline preview for images and PDFs
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to preview images and PDFs inline without downloading.
acceptanceCriteria: Images (jpeg, png, gif, webp) show clickable thumbnail preview
PDFs show Preview button that opens signed URL in new tab
Non-previewable files show download button only
userStories.notes: Added isPreviewableImage/isPreviewablePdf helpers. handlePreviewAttachment fetches signed URL, opens PDF in new tab, caches image URLs in state for inline thumbnail. Eye button for previewable files, Download button for all. Inline img with click-to-fullsize.

userStories.title: Tighten storage RLS (team isolation)
userStories.description: As a security measure, ensure users can only access their own team's email attachments in storage.
acceptanceCriteria: RLS policy checks storage path starts with user's team_id
Existing broad policies replaced with team-scoped versions
Service role bypasses RLS (uploads still work)
userStories.notes: Migration 20260225100000: Dropped 3 broad policies, created 3 team-scoped policies using get_team_id_from_document_path(name). INSERT/SELECT check team_members, DELETE restricted to admin/gestionnaire roles.

userStories.title: File type icons in attachment list
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, I want to see appropriate icons for different file types to quickly identify attachment types.
acceptanceCriteria: PDF: FileText icon, Images: Image icon, Spreadsheets: Sheet icon, Default: Paperclip
userStories.notes: Added getAttachmentIcon() helper mapping mime_type to Lucide icons. Imported ImageIcon + Sheet. Changed .map() from implicit to explicit return to use dynamic icon component.
